dungeons.name: Duality
dungeons.description: Dive into the depths of the exiled emperor's mind in search of dark secrets

uniqueLoot.title: Master Specific Rewards
uniqueLoot.description: Armor dropped in Master contains the Artifice intrinsic trait

typeModifiers.name: Champions: Unstoppable
typeModifiers.description: This mode contains Unstoppable Champions, which cannot be stopped without an Unstoppable mod

typeModifiers.name: Champions: Barrier
typeModifiers.description: This mode contains Barrier Champions, which cannot be stopped without an Anti-Barrier mod

typeModifiers.name: Match Game
typeModifiers.description: Enemy shields are highly resistant to all unmatched elemental damage

encounters.title: Mindscape Jumping Puzzle
encounters.description: Navigate thru the Mindscape by shooting the bells to switch between realms

encounters.title: Nightmare of Gahlran
encounters.description: Kill the Standard Bearers in the Nightmare realm and plant the Standard Essence you received into the symbol in the normal realm. Do this x2 to start damage on Gahlran

encounters.title: Dive Deeper
encounters.description: More jumping puzzle to navigate thru

encounters.title: Statue Puzzle
encounters.description: Turn the statues to all face the bell in the middle. Use the Nightmare realm to turn them by the switch on the back of each statue

encounters.title: The Vault
encounters.description: Grab the Standard Essence by killing the Standard Bearer in the Nightmare realm and planting it to it's corresponding symbol in the normal realm, then kill the mini boss that spawns in. You'll need to do this x3

encounters.title: Navigate the Vault
encounters.description: Last jumping puzzle on the way to the boss

encounters.title: Nightmare of Caiatl
encounters.description: Similar to the previous encounters, grab the Standard Essence, plant the essence in the matching symbol, then you'll start damage phase. There's an annoying amount of ads here so watch out

dungeons.name: Grasp of Avarice
dungeons.description: A cautionary tale for adventurers willing to trade their humanity for riches

uniqueLoot.title: Master Specific Rewards
uniqueLoot.description: Armor dropped in Master contains the Artifice intrinsic trait

typeModifiers.name: Champions: Overload
typeModifiers.description: This mode contains Overload Champions, which cannot be stopped without an Overload mod

typeModifiers.name: Champions: Barrier
typeModifiers.description: This mode contains Barrier Champions, which cannot be stopped without an Anti-Barrier mod

typeModifiers.name: Match Game
typeModifiers.description: Enemy shields are highly resistant to all unmatched elemental damage

encounters.title: Loot Cave Entrance
encounters.description: Gather enough engrams to enter the loot cave

encounters.title: Phry'zhia, The Insatiable
encounters.description: Defeat the oversized ogre by gathering engrams then doing optimal damage

encounters.title: Sparrow Run
encounters.description: Mount your fastest sparrow and make it to the end. Be sure to get those mines on the floor for more time

encounters.title: Fallen Shield
encounters.description: Bring down the fallen shield in the sky by finding and defeating the Servitors and yeeting it's corpse into it

encounters.title: Captain Avarokk, The Covetous
encounters.description: Gather engrams to do damage and defeat this Captain. Watch out for his buddies

dungeons.name: Prophecy
dungeons.description: Enter the realm of the Nine and ask the question: "What is the nature of the Darkness?"

encounters.title: Entrance
encounters.description: Gather motes by killing the Knights in the Light/Dark and dunking them in their respective pillars

encounters.title: Phalanx Echo
encounters.description: Defeat the Phalanx by dunking the Light/Dark motes into the pillars by bring down his shield, then onto damage

encounters.title: The Wasteland
encounters.description: Find and destroy the blights around the Wasteland

encounters.title: Hexahedron
encounters.description: Look for Toland orb to see which pillar you need motes for (Light/Dark). The room will rotate and you'll need to do it again till you eventually reach the Centurion bosses

encounters.title: Rainbow Road (Deadsea)
encounters.description: Ride your sparrow (or don't) to end of the Rainbow Road

encounters.title: Kell Echo
encounters.description: Dunk Light/Dark motes into their pillars to face the Kell Echo

encounters.title: Final Chest (Not really an encounter)
encounters.description: Grab your loot!

dungeons.name: Pit of Heresy
dungeons.description: Deep beneath Sorrow's Harbor, the Hive keep their darkest secrets

encounters.title: Necropolis
encounters.description: Drop into the first tower right off the cliff to find your runes. Goto the towers with these runes and kill the bosses inside

encounters.title: Wall of Doors
encounters.description: Find the right door to go thru

encounters.title: Tunnels of Despair
encounters.description: Dunk 3 orbs into the vessels at the end of each pathway by killing the Knights inside the caves. Watch out for the unkillable Orgres roaming

encounters.title: Chamber of Suffering
encounters.description: Kill Knights to gather their orbs and dunk them into the pillar in the middle; you'll need to do this 6 times. Watch out for the Curse of Suffering debuff

encounters.title: The Harrow
encounters.description: Find the pillars that match the runes in the entrance, it'll have Wizards and enemies around them. Kill them to proceed

encounters.title: Zulmak, Instrument of Torment
encounters.description: Kill the big Knights roaming to defeat the 3 mini-bosses around the room. Then onto damage phase for Zulmak
